class.name: tercom_rviz_plugins/FilterStatusPanel
class.description: ESKF filter state, NIS sparkline, and health gauges

class.name: tercom_rviz_plugins/TercomQualityPanel
class.description: TERCOM match quality gauges and accept/reject decision

class.name: tercom_rviz_plugins/ErrorHistoryPanel
class.description: Navigation error vs ground truth — live charts and statistics

class.name: tercom_rviz_plugins/ProfilingPanel
class.description: Execution time and call frequency profiler for all TERCOM/ESKF components
